headline: Up 250% YTD, Does Seagate Have More Upside Ahead?
summary: Few large-cap stocks have rerated as violently in 2026 as Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX). The hard drive maker has ridden a wave of AI-driven storage demand, HAMR product qualification wins, and serial earnings beats to one of the largest moves in the NASDAQ this year. After such an extraordinary run, the question is whether the stock ... Up 250% YTD, Does Seagate Have More Upside Ahead?

summary: Tech stocks are set to notch their strongest first half of the year since 2023, when the AI boom first drove equities higher.

headline: Chip Stocks’ Best Quarter Ever Is Ending With Some Wild Swings
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Chip stocks are heading for their best quarter ever, extending an extraordinary start to the year driven by insatiable demand for artificial intelligence equipment. But after recent jitters sent the stocks tumbling, investors are wondering how much further the rally can go.
